chosen_logo.why: Inline SVG sitting in <header>, viewBox 0 0 137 36 (the canonical wordmark aspect ratio), 9 paths with maxPathDLen ≈ 3023 — clearly the typeset 'L'ORÉAL' wordmark visible at the top center of every screenshot. Currentcolor-flippable so it works on both white and dark covers.

brand_primary.name: ink-black
brand_primary.evidence: color_frequency #1 (331 occurrences across all 8 pages) — used for wordmark, body type, hairlines and primary CTA borders. The L'Oréal corporate identity is fundamentally black-on-white.

brand_secondary.name: stone-beige
brand_secondary.evidence: color_frequency #11 (48 occurrences, all 8 pages) — the warm neutral seen as section-divider band on the brands-portfolio screenshot and in editorial hero overlays. The signature L'Oréal warm tone that lifts the design out of pure corporate B/W into luxury beauty.

ink.name: graphite
ink.evidence: color_frequency #3 (216 occurrences) — body-text color, softer than pure black, gives editorial copy a slightly warm-grey feel.

paper.name: paper-white
paper.evidence: color_frequency #2 (329 occurrences) — page background. L'Oréal's surfaces are uncompromisingly white, making the typography and photography do all the work.

accents.name: link-blue
accents.evidence: color_frequency 80 — link / interactive accent. Restrained corporate blue, used sparingly for inline links and secondary CTAs.

accents.name: commit-green
accents.evidence: color_frequency 32 — appears on the For-The-Planet sustainability commitments pages. Semantic green for environmental/positive content.

accents.name: deep-navy
accents.evidence: color_frequency 32 — used on dark editorial cards and image overlays as an alternative to pure black for hero treatments.

accents.name: fog-grey
accents.evidence: color_frequency 32 — light surface tint for alternate-section banding and card backgrounds.

display_font.evidence: fonts.computed_heading lists Halesworth (proprietary L'Oréal serif) with Times New Roman / Times as fallback chain. Visible as light-weight serif italic in 'Who We Are' / 'Our History' hero treatments.

body_font.family: 'Helvetica Now Display', 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif
body_font.evidence: fonts.computed_primary = HelveticaNowDisplay (101 occurrences, dominates body and chrome). HelveticaNowDisplay is a paid Monotype face — fallback chain provides graceful degrade.

mono_font.evidence: Not present on the recon site, included as a generic technical fallback for tabular figures and code blocks.

spacing_radius_shadow.evidence: Computed surfaces show buttons with 0px or near-0px radius (square CTAs in the cookie banner), no shadow elevation in the chrome, and section padding is generous. The chrome avoids any SaaS-style soft-shadow card look — everything sits on the page like editorial typesetting.
